# Komodo Provider

Terraform provider for managing Komodo resources via the Komodo API.

## Authentication

The provider supports two authentication methods. API key is preferred because it does not expose the account password.

### API key (preferred)

Generate an API key in the Komodo UI (**Settings → API Keys**) or via the [`komodo_api_key`](../resources/api_key.md) resource.

```terraform
provider "komodo" {
  endpoint   = "https://your-komodo-server.com"
  api_key    = var.komodo_api_key
  api_secret = var.komodo_api_secret
}
```

Set credentials via environment variables for CI/CD:

```sh
export KOMODO_ENDPOINT="https://your-komodo-server.com"
export KOMODO_API_KEY="<key>"
export KOMODO_API_SECRET="<secret>"
```

### Username / password

```terraform
provider "komodo" {
  endpoint = "https://your-komodo-server.com"
  username = var.komodo_username
  password = var.komodo_password
}
```

See the [Authentication section in the README](https://github.com/sebastianfs82/terraform-provider-komodo#authentication) for full details.

## Example Usage

```terraform
provider "komodo" {
  # Reads KOMODO_ENDPOINT, KOMODO_API_KEY, KOMODO_API_SECRET from environment
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `api_key` (String) The Komodo API key. Can also be set via the KOMODO_API_KEY environment variable. Use with api_secret as an alternative to username/password.
- `api_secret` (String, Sensitive) The Komodo API secret. Can also be set via the KOMODO_API_SECRET environment variable. Use with api_key as an alternative to username/password.
- `endpoint` (String) The Komodo API endpoint URL. Can also be set via the KOMODO_ENDPOINT environment variable.
- `password` (String, Sensitive) The Komodo password. Can also be set via the KOMODO_PASSWORD environment variable.
- `username` (String) The Komodo username. Can also be set via the KOMODO_USERNAME environment variable.
